new_findings.pattern: I thought it would work like advertised
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about expectations and advertisement does not appear in real samples.

new_findings.pattern: Can you clarify that for me, please?
new_findings.rationale: This polite request for clarification is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I feel quite disappointed with the
new_findings.rationale: This expression of disappointment is not found in any real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I can't belive how awful your service has been!
new_findings.rationale: This specific expression of frustration with service quality is unique to the synthetic batch.
